entry.title: python_circle_number
entry.content:
‘’’python

size = int(input(“please input size: “))

array = [[0]*size]

#创建一个二维数组，python只有列表类型

for i in range(size-1):

array += [[0]*size]

#orient代表绕圈的方向

#0代表向下，1代表向右，2代表向左，3代表向上

orient = 0

#填入二维列表元素

#j控制行索引，K代表列索引

j = 0

k = 0

for i in range(1,size*size+1):

array[j][k] = i

#如果位于一号线上

if j + k == size - 1:

​ if j > k:

​ orient = 1

​ else:

​ orient = 2

#如果位于2号线上

elif j == k and k >= size / 2:

​ orient = 3

elif j == k - 1 and k <= size / 2:

​ orient = 0

#根据方向来控制行列索引的改变

if orient == 0:

​ j += 1

elif orient == 1:

​ k += 1

elif orient == 2:

​ k -= 1

elif orient == 3:

​ j -= 1

for i in range(size):

for j in range(size):

​ print(‘%02d ‘ % array[i][j] ,end=””)

print(“”)

‘’’

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
